parameters.jsCode: const input = $input.first()?.json ?? {}; const workflowName = input.workflow?.name || input.workflowName || 'Unknown workflow'; const executionId = input.execution?.id || input.executionId || 'n/a'; const failedNode = input.lastNodeExecuted || input.node?.name || input.nodeName || 'n/a'; const message = input.error?.message || input.message || input.error?.description || 'Unknown error'; const stack = input.error?.stack || input.stack || ''; const combined = `${message}\n${stack}`; const severity = /(429|rate\s*limit|quota|timeout|econn|network|discord)/i.test(combined) ? 'warning' : 'error'; const color = severity === 'warning' ? 16763904 : 15548997; return [{ json: { discord: { content: `n8n ${severity.toUpperCase()}: ${String(workflowName).slice(0, 120)}`, embeds: [{ title: `Workflow failed: ${String(workflowName).slice(0, 200)}`, color, fields: [{ name: 'Execution', value: String(executionId), inline: true }, { name: 'Node', value: String(failedNode).slice(0, 200), inline: true }, { name: 'Severity', value: severity, inline: true }, { name: 'Error', value: String(message).slice(0, 1000) || 'Unknown error' }], footer: { text: 'Discord Error Notifier' }, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }] } } }];
